id.description: Stable unique id within the tree.

label.description: Accessible name for the item. Also used as the typeahead key.

disabled.description: When true, the item cannot be selected or actioned. Still keyboard-reachable.

branch.description:
Required to make a node behave as a branch. Without `branch` or `loadChildren`,
the node is a leaf regardless of any `children` snippet. The children snippet's
presence is NOT sufficient — see tree.svelte plan for rationale.

selectionScopeIds.description: Explicit selectable ids controlled by this item in cascade checkbox-selection mode.

unsupportedProps.name: children
unsupportedProps.description: Nested TreeItem children for branch nodes.

unsupportedProps.name: loadChildren
unsupportedProps.description:
Async loader called the first time the item is expanded. Implies `branch=true`.
The loader mutates consumer-owned reactive state; it returns no data.
Errors are forwarded to `onLoadError` if provided, otherwise logged via
`console.error` with a `[cinder-tree]` prefix.

unsupportedProps.name: onLoadError
unsupportedProps.description: Called when `loadChildren` rejects with a non-abort error.

unsupportedProps.name: row
unsupportedProps.description: Optional row content snippet override. Default renders `label`.
